name: Rebound Shift
author: Poki
description: Rebound Shift is a platform adventure where your power to shapeshift is the key to survival! Jump, bounce, and collect stars as you switch between Sticky, Bouncy, and Hard forms to overcome tricky obstacles and physics-based puzzles. Outsmart deadly traps, master your timing, and use your forms to find the perfect path to freedom. Ready to shift, jump, and reclaim your escape? How to play Rebound Shift? W: Hard form Q: regular form E: Sticky form R: Bouncy form Click and hold to aim, release to shoot Who created Rebound Shift? Rebound Shift is created by Jam Jar Jet. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Rebound Shift for free? You can play Rebound Shift for free on Poki. Can I play Rebound Shift on mobile devices and desktop? Rebound Shift can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
